description_long: This is a modern two-story house featuring a combination of wood and concrete exterior finishes. The structure has a distinctive asymmetrical roof with a split-level design, creating a dynamic architectural profile. Large windows are distributed across the facade, allowing for ample natural light and providing a contemporary aesthetic. The front includes a covered entryway with a small porch and a visible bicycle, while the rear features a spacious balcony or terrace area. The house sits on a flat, rectangular base, suggesting integration with an urban lot or street. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and industrial materials.
description: A modern two-story house with an asymmetrical split roof, wood and concrete exterior, large windows, and a covered entryway with a balcony.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, large windows, and a covered porch area, highlighting the split-level roof and wood facade.
description_view_1: The left side view emphasizes the balcony or terrace area, with the split roof and railing clearly visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a simpler facade with fewer windows and the continuation of the wood siding, as well as the full length of the split roof.
description_view_3: The right side view features the secondary entrance, a small overhang, and a visible bicycle, with the wood paneling and window arrangement evident.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some smaller accent windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a small porch, overhang, and a single main door, accented by large windows and minimal decorative elements.
